OPPOSITION TO DEFTS DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKER-GAYLORD, RAYMOND
RESPONSE TO PLTF'S OBJECTION TO REQ FOR JUDICIAL NTC; POS FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. AND CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE OWNER OCCUPIED; 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE TENDER AND ADDRESS GOMES, FRAZIER AND FONTENOT RE PREJUDICE AND DEFENDANTS STANDING TO FORECLOSE; 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING LOAN NOT ASSIGNED TO DEUTSCHE BANK; AND CHASE BANK NOT AUTHORIZED TO ACCEPT PAYMENT UNDER NOTE AND DEED OF TRUST AS SERVICER OF LOAN; 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION SEE SECTION 7 OF OPPOSITION; 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND SEE ORTIZ V. ACCREDITED HOME LENDER 639 F SUPP 2D 1159, 1168; 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO REALLEGE AS REMEDY AND ALLEGE NON DUPLICATIVE BASIS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-27-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Jason W. Estavillo of Law Office of Janson Estavillo (510-982-3001) appearing for plaintiff Raymond Parker-Gaylord opposing party.
Atty. John C Hedger of Bryan Cave (415-675-3400) appearing for defendants moving party.

Argued, Tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. and California Reconveyance Company's Demurrer to complaint. First cause of action - sustain with leave to allege owner occupied; 2nd cause of action - Sustain with leave to amend to allege tender and address Gomes, Frazier and Fontenot re prejudice and defendants standing to foreclose; 3rd cause of action - sustain with leave to allege facts showing loan not assigned to Deutsche Bank; and Chase Bank not authorized to accept payment under Note and Deed of Trust as servicer of loan; 4th cause of action - Sustain without leave to amend, no substantive opposition see section 7 of opposition; 5th cause of action sustain without leave to amend see Ortiz v. Accredited Home Lender 639 F Supp 2d 1159, 1168; 6th cause of action - sustain with leave to reallege as remedy and allege non duplicative basis for declaratory relief. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Continued To Jan-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 10, 2013 court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
